selling_points: Licensed and fully insured general contractor serving NEPA for over 20 years.
We handle everything — design, permits, construction, inspections. One point of contact from start to finish.
Local crews only. No out-of-area subcontractors. We stand behind every project we build.

faq.free_estimate: Yes — we offer free on-site consultations and written estimates. No obligation.
faq.licensed: We are fully licensed and insured in Pennsylvania. We carry general liability and workers' comp. Happy to provide certificates on request.
faq.permits: We handle all permitting, inspections, and township approvals. You don't have to deal with any of it.
faq.timeline: Timelines vary by project. A kitchen remodel typically runs 4–8 weeks. An addition is 3–5 months. We give you a detailed schedule before work begins — and we stick to it.
faq.payment: We require a deposit to mobilize, with milestone payments tied to project phases. Final payment is due on completion and your sign-off. No surprise change orders without your approval.
faq.survey: Yes, we offer land surveying for boundary determination, lot splits, and new construction. Required before most new builds and additions.
faq.custom_home: We build fully custom homes — from design through certificate of occupancy. We work with your architect or can connect you with one we trust.
faq.winter_work: We work year-round. Interior work, roofing prep, and framing can all proceed in winter. We'll tell you upfront if weather will affect your schedule.
faq.parking: Our office is at 88 Prospect Ave. Street parking available. Most initial meetings happen at your project site.

project_types.addition: Home additions typically run $150–$300 per sq ft depending on complexity, finishes, and site conditions.
project_types.remodel: Kitchen remodels average $25,000–$80,000 depending on size and finishes. Bathroom remodels run $10,000–$35,000.
project_types.deck: Decks start around $8,000–$15,000 for pressure-treated, and $20,000+ for composite or hardwood.
project_types.roofing: Roofing costs depend on size, pitch, and material. We provide exact quotes after a site visit.
project_types.new_home: New custom homes in NEPA typically run $200–$350 per sq ft for the build, not including land.

tone: professional, straightforward, and trustworthy — contractors deal with skeptical homeowners who've been burned before
primary_goal: schedule a free on-site consultation and estimate
greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Keystone Building & Contracting 🏗️ Whether you're planning a remodel, addition, or new build — we're here to help. What project are you thinking about?
after_hours_message: Our office is closed right now, but we're always planning the next project. Leave your name and number and we'll reach out first thing tomorrow to schedule a free site visit.
lead_captured_message: Perfect, {name}! One of our project managers will call you to schedule a free on-site consultation. We look forward to seeing what we can build together.
fallback_message: Happy to help — are you looking for an estimate on a specific project, or do you have a question about our services or process?
